title: T-068 — E2E: formulation edit → submit-for-trial → lock + version compare (NPD-g)
prompt:
# T-068 — Formulation lifecycle E2E

PRD: 01-NPD-PRD.md §17.11.1
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Playwright E2E covering full formulation lifecycle: open editor → add 5 ingredients summing to 100% → save-draft (auto) → submit-for-trial → lock → open compare-versions modal against v1 → verify diff + audit log + cascade to fa.recipe_components.

## Implementation contract
1. apps/web/e2e/npd/formulation.spec.ts: login as core_user → open formulation page → CRUD ingredients → wait debounce → submit → lock → compare → assert diff.
2. Integration test apps/web/__tests__/integration/formulation-cascade.test.ts: verifies fa.recipe_components row written after lockVersion + outbox event 'formulation.locked' fires once.
3. Fixtures seed an FA + project at G2 with empty formulation.

## Files
- apps/web/e2e/npd/formulation.spec.ts [create]
- apps/web/__tests__/integration/formulation-cascade.test.ts [create]
- apps/web/e2e/npd/fixtures/formulation-seed.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given a fresh project at G2 + empty formulation, when the user adds 5 ingredients summing to 100% then submits for trial, then formulation_versions.state transitions to 'submitted_for_trial' and the audit_log has a corresponding entry per §17.11.1
2. Given the user clicks Lock then Compare, when the compare modal opens, then it shows v1 vs v2 side-by-side diff for up to 50 rows per §17.11.1 compare contract
3. Given lockVersion completes, when the outbox is queried, then 'formulation.locked' is emitted exactly once and fa.recipe_components row matches the locked ingredients per §6 Chain 3

## Test strategy
- RED: write the 3 specs before final wiring; run against isolated test container
- Run 'pnpm --filter web test:e2e formulation && pnpm --filter web test formulation-cascade'

## Risk red lines
- Do not skip outbox event assertion
- Do not run against shared/staging DB
- Do not allow >50 ingredient diff rows in compare (paginate if longer)
